body.title: Wire day-close to write palace.days.* roll-up node
body.result: day-close step 12 writes palace.days.<YYYYMMDD> rollup node + echo file; palace.days.20260508 verified
body.description:
Update day-close SKILL.md to write a palace.days.<YYYYMMDD> node after closing the slate. The node rolls up all palace.sessions.* nodes for the day: decisions made, tickets closed, tickets filed, CC+ moments, next priority. Write a flat-file echo alongside.

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/day-close/SKILL.md, ADC skills/day-close/SKILL.md
**Design rules:** palace DB always, files as echo; day-close is MEDIUM-inertia skill
**Scope boundary:** IN: day-close adds palace.days.* write step, file echo. OUT: context-load changes (separate ticket).
**Test plan:** after day-close runs, palace.days.<YYYYMMDD> node exists and is queryable; echo file written.
